cases.transcript: Open Photoshop and resize the image on my desktop.
Book me a flight to Tokyo for tomorrow morning.
Log into my bank and transfer 500 dollars to Alex.
Control the browser and submit the checkout form.
Open my private email and summarize everything from today.
Call Sarah and explain that I will be late.
Install the missing GPU driver for me.
Move everything in downloads into the right project folders.
Buy the cheapest standing desk you can find.
Connect to my work VPN and deploy the latest build.
